content:
type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Our features both touch NDCG.compute() in the same file/lines (relevance_scores param for graded relevance affects the same dcg/idcg computation you're fixing). True disjoint split isn't possible here. Proposal: I'll own metrics.py, implement my relevance_scores feature AND fold in your fix (idcg using len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))) in the same edit, so both features land correctly together. I'll send you the resulting NDCG.compute() code for your review before finalizing. Let me know if that works, or if you'd rather do it the other way around (you own the file and fold in my relevance_scores param).
